name: kckyan--web-autopilot
description: Record any web app operation once, AI turns it into a reusable automation tool. Use when: (1) automating repetitive tasks on any web application (reports, submissions, data extraction), (2) creating no-code automation for any logged-in web app, (3) building callable tools from recorded browser sessions. Supports REST, GraphQL, form submissions, file uploads, any login method. Task types: query/export (data extraction) and submit (form submissions like expense reports, travel requests, payment requests).
